name: DO NOT LET THEM GET AWAY WITH THIS
subject: IT BEGINS: The attempt to SILENCE Black voices in our Democracy
body:
https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/tennessee?amount=25&refcode=051026_2 [https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/tennessee?amount=25&refcode=051026_2]
Voting rights advocates warned us about this - and now the worst case scenario is underway.
FIRST : Trump and the GOP realized they were losing public support
THEN : The Supreme Court KILLED the Voting Rights Act so the GOP could feel free to be as racist as they've always dreamed
NOW : Republicans are moving aggressively to redraw districts NATIONWIDE to make sure that Black Americans NEVER HAVE A VOICE AGAIN
Republicans in Tennessee have ALREADY passed a congressional map that eliminates the state’s only majority-Black district. 450,000 Black voters have lost the representation they fought decades to secure.
MAKE NO MISTAKE: THIS IS HOW THEY PLAN TO STEAL THE 2026 ELECTION
We're launching an emergency response effort to help support Democrats fighting back with voter protection programs, turnout operations, and rapid-response organizing. This is the Civil Rights fight of our lives, and all good Democrats need to step up - or we're going to lose everything. PLEASE, will you chip in any amount you can to help SAVE our Democracy? body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP) Team, this is the best news you'll read today!!

Democrat Amy Klobuchar just introduced a groundbreaking new bill that would AUTOMATICALLY register every single eligible voter in the United States.

[Donald Trump's MAGA Republicans would NEVER be able to steal our elections again!!!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=3&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)

So we're DEMANDING Congress pass this bill ASAP - _but we have no idea if Democrats in your area approve of Amy Klobuchar 's Amazing bill._ **[Do you approve of Amy Klobuchar's _Register America to Vote Act?_ →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=4&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)** | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=5&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=6&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=7&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)
---
**[** YOU ARE 1 OF 1,OOO DEMOCRATS SELECTED TO RESPOND **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74020?t=8&akid=24231%2E4449941%2EOz7krP)**
Amy Klobuchar's GROUNDBREAKING bill would:

✅ Ensure all eligible voters are automatically registered to vote!
✅ Undo decades of Republican voter suppression!!
✅ Stop Republicans from stealing the Midterm Elections!!!

Our Democracy works best when every voice is heard, and this bill would remove the barriers that keep millions of Americans from voting.

_But here 's the thing - Trump and MAGA Republicans are already going after it because they know higher voter turnout means they'll lose future elections._

The data is in, Team, and it's not good. 16 states enacted **31 new suppressive anti-voting laws in 2025**. According to the nonpartisan Brennan Center, this is the second-highest total since they started tracking voter suppression laws in 2011. Check out this map:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131153623/620113765/-1189249029?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOWMzYjgwLWNjNGMtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wiP1-Nurp4HfzUltcvwNAvJI-FjXWC0AUZts5TqBgLA=&emci=b07191a3-9b4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=df9c3b80-cc4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=33603084)
---
Last year, in fact, we told you that the Brennan Center said **"**_states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021_ ". **2025 just beat that.** The implications for the upcoming midterms are huge. We're barrelling towards one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime and every state marked in red on that map made it harder for eligible voters to cast a ballot. **[Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. Help us push back with $35 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131153624/620113805/-1725532854?refcode=051026_3&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOWMzYjgwLWNjNGMtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wiP1-Nurp4HfzUltcvwNAvJI-FjXWC0AUZts5TqBgLA=)**

| | | Need more facts? **Lawmakers in 47 of our 50 states proposed suppressive legislation in 2025**. More is on the way, with **more than a half-dozen suppressive bills pre-filed in states like Arizona, Virginia, and Missouri** that allow for pre-filing ahead of state legislature sessions. None of that includes bills filed in legislatures that already started sessions in January, either. It's all part of a pattern two decades in the making. **From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference** , suppressive state legislators in states across the country are trying their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Unlike the opponents of voting rights driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, **we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count**. That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now. **[Standing up for our fundamental right to vote is the only answer. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: BCJ - State Voting Laws Roundup: 2025 in Review| | | | | | This is what we've always been up against: States that execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here. It's scary, and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go. = | | | | = The data is in, Team, and it's not good. 16 states enacted 31 new suppressive anti-voting laws in 2025. According to the nonpartisan Brennan Center, this is the second-highest total since they started tracking voter suppression laws in 2011. Check out this map: Last year, in fact, we told you that the Brennan Center said "states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ". 2025 just beat that. The implications for the upcoming midterms are huge. We're barrelling towards one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime and every state marked in red on that map made it harder for eligible voters to cast a ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | | = | | = | | = | | | Need more facts? Lawmakers in 47 of our 50 states proposed suppressive legislation in 2025. More is on the way, with more than a half-dozen suppressive bills pre-filed in states like Arizona, Virginia, and Missouri that allow for pre-filing ahead of state legislature sessions. None of that includes bills filed in legislatures that already started sessions in January, either. It's all part of a pattern two decades in the making. From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference , suppressive state legislators in states across the country are trying their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Unlike the opponents of voting rights driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count. That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now. = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Brian Poindexter
subject: An ironworker just won. Now what?
body:
The real fight starts now.
| Team, it’s Brian Poindexter, and I’ve got big news.

We won.

I keep saying it out loud because I'm still letting it sink in. A union ironworker just won a Democratic primary for Congress in OH-7, and it happened because working people across this district showed up and said they're ready for something different.

[I’ll cut to the chase, the Voter Protection Project said I could reach out because we need all the help we can get to win in November. Will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and me to power us through November?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109001?t=6&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109001?t=7&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE) Every dollar chipped in, every door you knocked, every time someone shared this campaign with a friend and told them it was worth paying attention to. That's what won Tuesday night. Not corporate PAC money. Not a political machine. People.

But I'm not going to celebrate for long because the real fight just started. Max Miller is waiting, and he's got every advantage money can buy. His corporate donors are already writing checks, and the national Republican machine is going to do everything it can to hold this seat.

We just proved we can win a primary the hard way. Now we have to prove we can take on the full weight of the GOP in November. That means building a war chest from the ground up the same way we've done everything else, with working people showing up for each other.

[Can you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and me today to help us head into the rest of this cycle?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109001?t=8&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Brian Poindexter and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109002?t=9&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109004?t=11&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109005?t=12&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109001?t=13&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE)
I'm not done fighting. I hope you aren't either.

— Brian
878179

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=24237%2E878179%2EYdEGhE).**

name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: Please join our urgent call to leaders in Washington today: End the pointless forever wars
body:
For decades, warmongering politicians have sent America’s best to fight and die in conflicts with no clear mission, no exit strategy, and no accountability. Today, we’re asking for your help to demand something different.
#
Peter — today, we’re asking you to join our urgent call to leaders in Washington:
**End the pointless forever wars that make us all less safe.**
**[SIGN ON NOW: END THE FOREVER WARS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-letter-20260510?t=1&akid=10448%2E614464%2ESaTsMT)**
For decades, warmongering politicians on both sides have sent America’s best to fight and die in conflicts with no clear mission, no exit strategy, and no accountability. Meanwhile, the defense contractors and connected insiders who profit from these endless wars keep getting richer and richer.
**These elites are stripping our communities for parts — and our entire country is suffering from their power-hungry greed.**
_Enough is enough._
That’s why we’re urging you to join our call to demand something different: A government that actually serves working families — not elites, insiders, and warmongers.
**[So please, Peter, will you add your name to our call to END the pointless forever wars?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-letter-20260510?t=2&akid=10448%2E614464%2ESaTsMT)**
**[SIGN ON NOW: END THE FOREVER WARS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-letter-20260510?t=3&akid=10448%2E614464%2ESaTsMT)**
Thanks for standing with us.
— Heartland Patriots HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hp-email-footer?refcode=em20260510-10448-footer&t=4&refcode2=10448_614464_SaTsMT&akid=10448%2E614464%2ESaTsMT)**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: can’t do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Tom Tiffany was handpicked by Donald Trump, and when the pressure hits, he won’t stand with working families.
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to unsubscribe, [click here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7010?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=1&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL).
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7008?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=2&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL)
| [ ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7008?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=5&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL) Folks, the fight of working families is my fight, too.

On May Day, I stood with working Wisconsinites who are fighting just to earn a living wage. I’ll keep that energy as governor, too.

[**_But to get there, I first need to defeat my billionaire-funded opponent, Tom Tiffany. I refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me win the race for Wisconsin governor and reach our $21,000 same-day goal? _**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7039?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=6&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL) | | [ CHIP IN $10 NOW → ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7039?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=7&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL)
---
Tom Tiffany was handpicked by Donald Trump, and when the pressure hits, he won’t stand with working families. He’ll fall in line, backing anti-worker policies that put billionaires first and leave Wisconsin families behind.

That’s why I’m working day and night to get ahead in this razor-thin race. _A new poll shows us ahead by just 2% – that’s within the margin of error!_

But I can’t do it alone, especially because Tiffany is backed by MAGA billionaires who could spend up to **$40 million to flip Wisconsin red. **

[**_So, can I count on you to chip in any amount that you can spare today? Reaching each of our fundraising goals is how we defeat Trump’s hand-picked candidate and keep Wisconsin blue. _**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/7039?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_may-day_B1_F1_S1_C1_30DO30DC_N-T0&t=8&akid=6134%2E196590%2E-vsGYL)

name: The Democratic Party
subject: You stood out, Derek
body:
---
Derek, we’re not sending this email to everyone — we’re reaching out to you specifically today because **_you stood out._** You’re one of our top grassroots supporters. You’ve been getting emails from us for a while, staying up to date on the DNC’s work to win the midterms this year. We appreciate your dedication to helping our country. Today, we’re asking you to take the next step and [**chip in $7 to the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7069_fr&refcode2=7069_22930333_fon0oo&akid=7069%2E22930333%2Efon0oo) But first, let us explain why: **This year, Democrats have a real chance to flip the House and the Senate and put a _massive_ check on the Trump administration.** We’re already scaling up our work to win races up and down the ballot, but we need your help. Thanks to the support of our grassroots donors this year, we’ve been able to register thousands of new Democrats in key battleground states, continue organizing nationwide to reach as many voters as we can, and funnel resources to state parties to help them win down-ballot races everywhere. But Derek, we’re not slowing down. In fact, _we’re scaling up_. That’s why we need your help. [**Will you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help us continue building on our momentum across the country and working to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7069_fr&refcode2=7069_22930333_fon0oo&akid=7069%2E22930333%2Efon0oo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7069_fr&refcode2=7069_22930333_fon0oo&akid=7069%2E22930333%2Efon0oo)**

name: Christian Urrutia
subject: "Being hung in public is better than you deserve."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Below is the death threat I just received, sent by the Libertarian Party of New Hampshire to me and then amplified to their account of 100,000 followers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
It’s clear what they want to do — incite someone to hurt me or my family.
I’m Christian Urrutia, the Democrat running for Congress in NH-01, America's most vulnerable open blue seat. I'm an economic populist and a first-generation Mexican-American son of immigrants. An Army officer. And someone who still believes in this country enough to fight for it.
To the far-right someone like me attaining elected office is an existential threat.
These type of extremists showed up to an event I spoke at waving Nazi flags trying to stop me from speaking (I gave my speech anyways). They send me messages telling me that my life may “abruptly come to an end.” They send me pictures of nooses.
Because they hate me, they hate us, and they hate our vision.
This isn’t just about me. It’s about whether we let hate and political violence take root here in America. Or whether we stand up and say no. You know where I stand. But I can’t do this alone.
If you can, please make a donation to help us beef up security for my staff and I so we can continue rolling with the punches. Whether it's $50, $20, or even just $10 it will have an outsized impact. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
DONATE TODAY!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
Thank you in advance for your support at this inflection point for our campaign.
Christian Urrutia
Democrat for NH-01
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-nh1]
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.

Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

name: Roger Lau
subject: Can I level-set with you, Derek?
body:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-membercard?refcode=em_20260510_7072_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7072_22930333_uf2AMt&akid=7072%2E22930333%2Euf2AMt) Derek, it’s Roger Lau. I’m reaching out to update you on our progress this month, and what comes next. Democrats need to flip four Republican seats to take back control of the Senate this November. That means we’ll need to win races in states like Texas, North Carolina, Ohio, and Alaska. To take back the House, we’ll need to hold the seats we have and flip at least three more. **It’s a big task.** That’s why we’re focused on registering hundreds of thousands of new Democrats in battleground states like the ones I just mentioned, investing in state parties and campaigns, and taking the Trump administration to court to protect your right to vote. When you activate your DNC membership, you’re helping us build the largest midterm operation in our party’s history. **_It’s not going to be easy, but we’re going to win the midterms. The future of our democracy depends on it._** So, Derek, I’m asking: If winning back Congress matters to you, [**please make a $7 contribution to the DNC today. name: Claudia Ward
subject: For all the working moms
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154122/620155598/526203646?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUxNmZlYS1kYTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SapZ6NuX8TC1mnoVUSrtu4_Gl7FqYdCcA1dXBX5UP6A=)
Hey, it's Claudia, Eric's finance director. You might not know this, Peter, but while I’m running a full-fledged operation for Eric's re-election, I’m also taking care of both my young daughters who are 1 and 3. It's a demanding existence, helping develop young girls into full-fledged, confident, capable members of society while also keeping this competitive operation rolling. And like most working parents, I've seen a lot of pathways to upward mobility that are closing while right-wing extremists hijack our government. I see a lot of pundits and legislators fantasizing about the problematic past, and actors at the state and federal level calling to take us back to the Handmaid's Tale. Our generation already is worried about affording weekly groceries and gas. We're worried about our planet. And now we even have to worry about politicians who are taking away our rights as we lose freedoms our grandparents and parents fought for. **That's why I value being part of a team that supports my ability to do the work on my terms** , and doesn't force a one-size-fits-all view of how a 'working mother' should operate. It means more to work for someone who sees the full extent of my experience, and works to make sure I can thrive in this environment. And I also appreciate working for someone who actually backs up what they believe in, and who goes to bat on so many of the shared issues we face: from affordable, accessible childcare, to making remote work accessible, to balancing work schedules, to ensuring more voices are in leadership positions, to fighting for equal pay, and so much more. [**This is a campaign powered by the caregivers, the people wearing multiple hats, the working mothers. On this election year Mother's Day, can I count on you to chip in to Eric’s campaign today? It's important to support those supporting us, and in a race that’s going to be as competitive as this one, every single dollar matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154123/620155617/526203646?refcode=em-5.10.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUxNmZlYS1kYTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SapZ6NuX8TC1mnoVUSrtu4_Gl7FqYdCcA1dXBX5UP6A=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154124/620155618/526203646?refcode=em-5.10.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGUxNmZlYS1kYTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SapZ6NuX8TC1mnoVUSrtu4_Gl7FqYdCcA1dXBX5UP6A=)
---
This Mother’s Day, I’m thankful for those who paved the way, and those still fighting to improve our conditions. And I am proud to fight alongside people like Eric doing all they can to make sure my daughters and future generations of moms live in a country where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to live their best lives of their own volition.
All the best,
Claudia

clean_body: | = Hey, it's Claudia, Eric's finance director. You might not know this, Peter, but while I’m running a full-fledged operation for Eric's re-election, I’m also taking care of both my young daughters who are 1 and 3. It's a demanding existence, helping develop young girls into full-fledged, confident, capable members of society while also keeping this competitive operation rolling. And like most working parents, I've seen a lot of pathways to upward mobility that are closing while right-wing extremists hijack our government. I see a lot of pundits and legislators fantasizing about the problematic past, and actors at the state and federal level calling to take us back to the Handmaid's Tale. Our generation already is worried about affording weekly groceries and gas. We're worried about our planet. And now we even have to worry about politicians who are taking away our rights as we lose freedoms our grandparents and parents fought for. That's why I value being part of a team that supports my ability to do the work on my terms , and doesn't force a one-size-fits-all view of how a 'working mother' should operate. It means more to work for someone who sees the full extent of my experience, and works to make sure I can thrive in this environment. And I also appreciate working for someone who actually backs up what they believe in, and who goes to bat on so many of the shared issues we face: from affordable, accessible childcare, to making remote work accessible, to balancing work schedules, to ensuring more voices are in leadership positions, to fighting for equal pay, and so much more. = | = This Mother’s Day, I’m thankful for those who paved the way, and those still fighting to improve our conditions. And I am proud to fight alongside people like Eric doing all they can to make sure my daughters and future generations of moms live in a country where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to live their best lives of their own volition. All the best, Claudia | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. body:
Not just in words, but in action too.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154214/620155894/981257658?refcode=header-img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk2OTE3MWItZGQ0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L6v8CCNFAz_2DUTRXV-4xyPBWJB7874sfvHpgP4HGrI=)

Friend,

I celebrate women today and every day. **And not just in words, but in action too.**

As a doctor, I’ve dedicated my career to protecting women’s health and advancing their well-being. I’ve seen firsthand the unique challenges women face, and I’ve made it my mission to be a steadfast ally to them.

In Congress, I will build on my life’s work and fight to expand access to quality care, protect reproductive freedom, and ensure every woman has the opportunity to thrive.

Because supporting women isn’t symbolic – it’s a responsibility. And right now, too many in power are failing to meet it.

We need leadership that listens, acts, and delivers real results. **Leadership that views women’s health as essential, not optional.** [If you believe women deserve better, I’m asking you to take a stand with me. Chip in $5 today to help flip CA-22 and bring that leadership to Congress! >>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154215/620155895/-981150796?amount=5&refcode=JBFC_20260510_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk2OTE3MWItZGQ0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L6v8CCNFAz_2DUTRXV-4xyPBWJB7874sfvHpgP4HGrI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131154216/620155896/-981150796?amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=JBFC_20260510_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk2OTE3MWItZGQ0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L6v8CCNFAz_2DUTRXV-4xyPBWJB7874sfvHpgP4HGrI=)

body:

---
| | | Dear Friend,

I’m running for San Mateo County Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder & Chief Elections Officer to bring trusted leadership, accountability, and responsive public service to one of the county’s most important offices.

[](https://us.list-manage.com/pxZfeR9R6_2?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

This office impacts residents every single day, from ensuring fair property assessments and maintaining vital public records to protecting secure, accessible, and transparent elections. I’m committed to modernizing operations, restoring public trust, and delivering the professionalism and service San Mateo County residents deserve.

[DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/KrIrCwFoZeI?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand the importance of transparency, sound management, and delivering reliable services that people can count on.
Now, with our critical May 16 fundraising deadline quickly approaching, I’m asking for your support.

Every contribution helps us expand voter outreach, share our message across San Mateo County, and build the grassroots campaign needed to win this important race. We cannot afford to slow down at this critical moment.

Please make a contribution today and help us keep our momentum strong:

[DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/ZEXAXs6uyak?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

Thank you for your support, your encouragement, and your belief in leadership that puts San Mateo County residents first.

With gratitude,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor

P.S. The May 16th deadline is one of the most important moments of our campaign so far. Every donation made before midnight helps us reach more voters and build the momentum needed to win.

Every contribution helps us expand voter outreach, share our message across San Mateo County, and build the grassroots campaign needed to win this important race. We cannot afford to slow down at this critical moment. Please make a contribution today and help us keep our momentum strong: Thank you for your support, your encouragement, and your belief in leadership that puts San Mateo County residents first. With gratitude, David Canepa San Mateo County Supervisor P.S. The May 16th deadline is one of the most important moments of our campaign so far. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108945?t=7&akid=24234%2E878179%2EqF7GbV) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108945?t=8&akid=24234%2E878179%2EqF7GbV)

TO: Liberal Supreme Court Justices
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Liberal Justices,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As the MAGA majority DESTROYS the Voting Rights Act, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP caving to Trump — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: People are already voting for Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)
Peter, ballots for the California primary have been mailed, and people are already sitting down, filling them out, **and voting for Katie.**
We’re less than a month from the primary, and these final weeks are a sprint to reach as many voters as possible before their ballots are turned in and locked.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_3_ak.eOf6Si&refcode=em20260510-41317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)
This is what’s happening right now: **voters are making decisions in real time about California’s future. Once that ballot is in the envelope and dropped off, there’s no second chance to make the case.**
So we’re doing what we’ve always done—showing up, being direct, and meeting people where they are.
Katie is out on her Whiteboard Warriors tour, sitting down with Californians and breaking down what’s at stake. Our ads are on the air so voters hear directly from Katie, not filtered through anyone else. And our teams are working across the state to reach voters who don’t always get the loudest voices in this process.
_But all of that only works if we can keep it going at full speed._
These last weeks decide everything. Whether we reach the voter who’s still undecided. Whether we turn out the supporter who just needs one more reminder. Whether Katie gets across the finish line and onto the November ballot.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to help power this final stretch and give Katie the surge of support she needs ahead of June’s primary?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_3_ak.eOf6Si&refcode=em20260510-41317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_3_ak.eOf6Si&refcode=em20260510-41317&t=23&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)
Thank you,
Team Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260510-41317&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41317_3422442_KvgCXR&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41317&t=25&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41317)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41317&t=26&akid=41317%2E3422442%2EKvgCXR)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The End of Race-Based Gerrymandering?
body:
The Supreme Court has issued a major 6-3 decision which effectively prohibits the use of race to create “majority-minority” congressional districts: This is a great decision for democracy and affirms that the U.S. Constitution requires government to be color-blind in its decision-making.
| [ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=14409&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=cbf44e67f3ede953fe8e284608b1050d98304e9f4df39ddcd4fb05803b508a8c)
---
Dear Fellow American, The **Supreme Court** has issued a _major 6-3 decision_ which effectively _prohibits_ the use of race to create "majority-minority" congressional districts: **This is a great decision for democracy and affirms that the U.S. Constitution requires government to be color-blind in its decision-making.** | [HELP JUDICIAL WATCH FIGHT
RACE-BASED GERRYMANDERING ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)
**Judicial Watch** was proud to partner with the Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) in filing a key _amici_ brief (friend of the court) in support of this historic decision. Together, we argued: _Racial gerrymandering, like all "[r]acial classifications of any sort" cause "lasting harm to our society" because "[t]hey reinforce the belief, held by too many for too much of our history, that individuals should be judged by the color of their skin."_ _" There should be no question that race-based division...is a violation of the Equal Protection Clause"_ In his concurring opinion, Justice Thomas agreed stating: _" Blacks [we]re drawn into 'black districts' and given 'black representatives'... That interpretation rendered (Section 2) "repugnant to any nation that strives for the ideal of a color-blind Constitution."_ **This landmark ruling puts an end to the egregious racial segregation of voters...but now it must be enforced.** _Judicial Watch stands ready_ to do our part to enforce this decision and defend equal protection under the law. But these fights will require financial muscle. | [HELP US ENFORCE THIS RULING ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)
This is not theoretical for Judicial Watch. **We know how to fight back (and win) against illegal gerrymandering.** It was Judicial Watch's lawsuit which resulted in Maryland's 2021 congressional redistricting plan being struck down as violating state law. And just earlier this year, Judicial Watch pointed out that Maryland's proposed 2026 congressional map was in key respects identical to the unconstitutional gerrymander struck down in our prior lawsuit -- but _even more partisan_. Our election law team knows these _schemes_ and the _loopholes_ the Left will attempt to exploit. And,_we know how to fight them_. **_[Will you make a special tax-deductible gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)_****today to support Judicial Watch as we fight to enforce this Supreme Court victory?** | [MAKE A SPECIAL CONTRIBUTION NOW ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)
Thank you for considering a first-time gift to Judicial Watch to fund this fight for equal protection under the law. Sincerely, Tom Fitton
President, Judicial Watch P.S. Judicial Watch's position was just vindicated by the Supreme Court in a major decision against race-based gerrymandering. _The Court agreed with our argument_ that government must be color-blind in its decision-making. **But now this decision must be enforced**. _[Please make your best tax-deductible gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)_ today to help Judicial Watch enforce this important victory. | [DONATE TO JUDICIAL WATCH ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=81390&L=37724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL25kZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=68b0847428117e51ab31039e4536c339c16f4773136bac0bfa7930b30eeb998b)

name: Senator Tom Willis
subject: West Virginians Are Ready for a Change
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5954ff4ca17c/west-virginians-are-ready-for-a-change?e=a0285cc040)
---
|
---
| | | | | |

# West Virginians
# Are Ready for a Change

---
|
---
|
---
| |
Dear Friend,

**You’ve seen the incumbent’s barrage of television ads.**
**You’ve read her mailers.**
My campaign was never powered by political insiders or backroom endorsements handed out before anyone else was even in the race.
**Instead, this campaign has been built the old-fashioned way — by grassroots conservatives and volunteer-driven support from people all across West Virginia.**
And over the past months, I’ve been crisscrossing West Virginia —**shaking hands, visiting communities, listening to voters, and earning support face-to-face** while meeting the hardworking, resilient people who make this state special.
More and more West Virginians are realizing they don’t have to settle for the political establishment.
**People are ready for change.**
Ready for conservative leadership that will actually fight for West Virginia values.
Ready for someone who has lived the same real-world struggles they have — not someone who has spent a quarter century inside the Washington political machine.
**Because this campaign isn’t about political consultants or insider politics.**
**It’s about West Virginians.** It’s about service.It’s about faith, family, freedom, and putting our people first again.
**I’ve spent my life serving this country.**
Now we are just one day away from making history.
**The political establishment believes nothing will ever change.**
**But they’re wrong.**
**I’ve beaten the establishment before — and with your help, we will do it again.**
Because this race belongs to the people of West Virginia, not the political class.
**Tomorrow, we vote.**
And together, we can bring real conservative leadership back to Washington.
**IT’S TIME FOR A CHANGE, WEST VIRGINIA!**
Thank you for standing with me,
**Tom Willis**
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Unacceptable Peace Offer, Hantavirus Patient Zero, and Keeping a Diary
body:
President Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal Sunday, calling it "[totally unacceptable](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngS0RHMA2A8OVrrylU6WO1jEcYipsLEwS5e0r9xW6fp_0G_5ft-mGKaft_oEruRbLtNHryNQa1emxofe0N5wz7YSeSoxUF9wmENBdhLlIOQVM-T1pHlwkAlKcnOz7QVtl1cAXpwWowWspejLWzGaOWqrOBEtoOoGRJ3dqwkgphTCqv8bgpaW593EGY6xiWlBIrdTrd0lbWyjmd3lSvfqy8uyW1vaDqX8MRgZjq4-2HMUnzOd_jlpUwvy_bJjDZ32sO4NxL0c7GIxSdsaAFGCl1sMAouPVhf2Vck5H1zMt7iumX4q3P_V5OvgJAAD__-mrduE)" after Tehran sent its answer through Pakistani mediators.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O3CAYxJ8Gd17xH1NQRDptd2lTog_4WJNgsDC50719dKskZZq0o_nNjDTfXv0rlFra4ysc6GbuvuH7VXFOHP5ngxjxnBAqnggRe844dmieU65XqlbGfIJSP7xcksuIHMWCjhmzSSus2Jbdocmgg9yMRhu01IgYrBRSB81EDnop7jONKsYYpUqYW06RWQwm5sCVsoJIiqnMPm7fe2lzx1w_-huOW-zHUt0-53kR8YXwO-H3OSD--GOEOvfYWy4J2yxQPwnC75Qxo7UUqxWRr5IltdqIfIUNc7aCbkwBEfezQsQD2yTi5Xelv87erj78AaV5qhjlmnANqSQiXuIOZdTeHoTr-VRSGRhn8P_A_V9qGS6d76XWcmlDJH0cUJ6Tl_lfz7w5_isAAP__CD-jGQ) | |
# Monday, May 11, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1997, IBM's Deep Blue defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov, becoming the first computer to beat a [reigning world chess champion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAYBODT4A4LMF7sguI17va1Ka0f-FlIsLGAXcu3jzbKDVJ_mtFoPu7rHWKK--M_bKibz-uOZ03YGpb1uYO1eDQwCQ8Ei9l7LAH2VTBxo2yknK8OYrpW2TntEQUOHWqu1CTnYR6mLmjOJLtJD0Y5CWqSypqBT_MMRnEGDrqo321s5JwzNg6q987yGY2y3ohxnAciGbrYcuk_c9xbQJ-u_MLS27x1SYfWjkqGf0QsRCznefYh1pbL9XYilhZipQ4uGnf6K0Qsd7go50QsDvGgJj2ROvQIrdIHlHLRL6gHlPx6x2zAWukGzYauaHecMaVYb4pI9tggpp8l7U_3vbT4DgAA__8Z7YW5) in a match under tournament conditions. Kasparov resigned after 19 moves in the sixth and final game.
* * *
**BIG ANNOUNCEMENT:** You read this morning's _Flyover_. You start your day informed. But here's the thing: by the afternoon, a lot has happened since 6 a.m. We built _The Flyover_ because we believe you deserve news you can trust, delivered in a way that respects your time. And we've heard from many of you who love starting your morning with us, but wish you didn't have to wait until tomorrow to catch up on what breaks during the day. So we listened. Introducing _Flyover Updates_ , our brand new afternoon text message launching in just a couple of weeks. Once a day, in the afternoon, we'll send you the top three breaking news stories that happened since this morning's edition. Stories you haven't seen yet. News you don't want to miss. Delivered in a quick, easy-to-read text without any apps, algorithms, or wasted time. The world doesn't stop after our morning edition, and neither do we. Sign up now and be among the first to get _Flyover Updates_ the moment we go live: **[Sign up here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO4yAARb8Gd7F4GBMXFCut3GXbLRGPS8yIgIVJovz9KDPllFOfo3ul8_9iLjblVK7_7A26x2oKnkdG72jmXqz32Lt1GTusR40RbbPFcMrnE5UnxkywKb_MNAQdAQ4xQDOlztMiFnEeNg0xSSqo52qeFBizTDkbFOXUMTazZUj6vUYlY4xSKdQYg2cLnPLRcSkXQSaKkHpt40dNpW-I-VUfaKOvtyHrrff9IOIP4Svh60-F8HXfasHpuLvDt-RAxIqbTZmIv4RLLht82hNKH-8tGxRfA4L5Vt58aDrsz5RzOmZFJnp9k6_3_qtkD80_AwAA__8BaIAP)** Stay informed. Stay ahead. We'll see you in the afternoon.
* * *
Today's sponsor, [Daily Health Digital](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O3CAYxJ8Gd17xH1NQRDptd2lTog_4WJNgsDC50719dKskZZq0o_nNjDTfXv0rlFra4ysc6GbuvuH7VXFOHP5ngxjxnBAqnggRe844dmieU65XqlbGfIJSP7xcksuIHMWCjhmzSSus2Jbdocmgg9yMRhu01IgYrBRSB81EDnop7jONKsYYpUqYW06RWQwm5sCVsoJIiqnMPm7fe2lzx1w_-huOW-zHUt0-53kR8YXwO-H3OSD--GOEOvfYWy4J2yxQPwnC75Qxo7UUqxWRr5IltdqIfIUNc7aCbkwBEfezQsQD2yTi5Xelv87erj78AaV5qhjlmnANqSQiXuIOZdTeHoTr-VRSGRhn8P_A_V9qGS6d76XWcmlDJH0cUJ6Tl_lfz7w5_isAAP__CD-jGQ), explains the "joint drought" Harvard research suggests can dry out your joints from the inside--and how a simple 5-second daily method may help you move more comfortably again.
|
---
## Trump Rejects Iran Peace Response
President Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal Sunday, calling it "[totally unacceptable](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngS0RHMA2A8OVrrylU6WO1jEcYipsLEwS5e0r9xW6fp_0G_5ft-mGKaft_oEruRbLtNHryNQa1emxofe0N5wz7YSeSoxUF9wmENBdhLlIOQVM-T1pHlwkAlKcnOz7QVtl1cAXpwWowWspejLWzGaOWqrOBEtoOoGRJ3dqwkgphTCqv8bgpaW593EGY6xiWlBIrdTrd0lbWyjmd3lSvfqy8uyW1vaDqX8MRgZjq4-2HMUnzOd_jlpUwvy_bJjDZ32sO4NxL0c7GIxSdsaAFGCl1sMAouPVhf2Vck5H1zMt7iumX4q3P_V5OvgJAAD__-mrduE)" after Tehran sent its answer through Pakistani mediators. The White House didn't release full details, but reports said [Iran refused for now to discuss its nuclear](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHuozAMx_GnCZurYKCUgeGWbP9bb0QmOCWnkESJadW3P9FXuNnSV_59_vwsP-SDj8_fdPAsLi2R3zWwCJfljGQtZ6E1cGaynJzjslNcUOMd9ABtu2zkw2fpm212zMhdw3M7jo9-6qbu0ezzHa3rcKKhZ0ePVWvrOr0OqFe7jk67xs9XTQ9t22o9dOPNbbadeB2tW3EYpk71mjcvqdz-Jh9lZxc-6cXlZtPRhHkXyVV1vxQahSZ-cqpynRSaK6zQ6EGhabVCc1a49ik0Us4jQ-GaU9wqvL3s8KYSfXwCOeECvlCEwu6sXEESbL7as1aIpw1MBXJJz0IH-AiBhKvA1wi-SApNU-Ytv30Ivt5H1evnQT58f5b_gn7N-C8AAP__4UWUQQ) and missile programs, instead pushing to end the fighting and gradually reopen the Strait of Hormuz. U.S. officials have said any deal must restore the [free flow of traffic](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAYhJ_G7rAwF18Kim3SZdstrR_4idmDAQGJlbc_cnTe4FQjzUij-ebffbuDDz4-_sKBqrm0RTxrwNawbM8IxmBuoANmBIPJOSw7xI1RNhEqyThuFnx4b6K3yiEy5D2qcZ4XsfKVL_2ujDZOSKEpX2YEh7hoOjkEsRqYpMTeq6uNynEcKZV8Hpw144p6Nk4zKVfeCYrWt1SG_8nHtqML7_TCMph09EHtreXa8T8du3Xsdp7nELW5KK78clIJtmM3XyD-CClYc4oWLXlWkkvKqUIgH0bSIHxVUhs0JAdaD6RgTqVVUkwELoSgoi_K5tOH4Os0d4I-DvDhs6f96sSXYt8BAAD__5ltiOo) through the strait and prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons, while Trump warned Tehran against "playing games."
## Patient Zero Identified in Hantavirus Outbreak
Dutch ornithologist Leo Schilperoord, identified in reports as the [first passenger to fall ill and die](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAQBU8jZRT4EU0rYLCJM2-6oUCxm1avaVKg2hY8px94rjD5w0NV_bvO10CZyu1veKDnVOeCx56RGdv8LCFG3DgsGTcMEWtK2NZQZi31SUgrlJohUH7PYw8-IWo0PXrl3HmczGTO_epT1DZJsA6sHc8OALQxICcTQ5BoXE_-8yatUkpKa9yQIKoJFxfToq2dTDdKBOLahv-VCq-Y8ru-sA2xPvrsV-Zt78yfTl86fTmOY_goHIj3z6DTly0wYWHxha0KAixMiRDEGgqHF7XnLvaVNlGfvDQMd7HHlfKGrdYGQqnJaHuyffOwHZQz7SfXjfL2CJR_EPhX3V5efwcAAP__V4yEGQ) aboard the hantavirus-stricken _MV Hondius_ , had reportedly visited a landfill in Argentina popular with bird-watchers seeking rare species, where he may have been exposed to the virus. Seventeen Americans from the cruise ship are being flown from Tenerife, in Spain's Canary Islands, to Omaha, Nebraska, for monitoring at the University of Nebraska Medical Center. [See the photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEO2yAQhp8GbxcBtkM8eOjiLV07Wmd8hKswIMBJ8_aV-wodT5_06bv_13N9IgeOr5940NxcWiN9aqDWqKxnRGspN9wCZUJLyTkqHuOqpb6DHEGpdUcO33Xo9tkRaeo7mpUxj2Hqp_7R-XnbzYj3waHZlFEPa63eXO_MpOyDcOo7ni-bHJVSUo69ubndqok2Y92mx3HqxSBp55bK7Xfi2Dy58E1vKjebji7MvrVcRf9D6EXoJX5zqu1CQi-XWOhFjkIvSgq9nBWu_67TAB5U2GKsgPEPp7OGL-AHuXF8Ab3Rntg4RXAlHeAxNnxzOSvYcnIlqJ4zeCpU4eOxwYdDAI85U4SWoHm6Eroy7_lCXO9GDPJ1IId_5e2_5n7P-m8AAAD__13DlmU). ## Admin Open to Gas Tax Suspension
Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Sunday the Trump administration is "[open to all ideas](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAURp9GOwygjlpQ_I3d_O2W5goXvRsEAjiOb7-ZfYWtv-TLOefruTyBHPntPxyoig2Lxys7LAXTcnrQGmOB1WFE0BisxbSDXySXD8Z7JsRigNy9dLVRFlFiW6MSwzB2Uzu1Y72r1faac6E1Tj3CYPm0dtCOxtjHyg2MNanPG--FEJz37dBYo8WE66DtKvt-aquOo6ESUvMdyJcdrbvDC1Ojw1E7tZcSc9X-q-Rcyfm6rsaG98fis1dyPtAQVHJGj2m7WUadsEC62ZVo2wvLcGdW0nlEBuYgT7kkKBQ8CxE9y2eO6A35jVk0mMCxDTIr8GZwkGExkUaWz7RhnZSJFzlH-TFUHd8OIPdLWf6U9qXkTwAAAP__AnuTQw)," including suspending the federal gas tax, as pump prices hit $4.52 a gallon nationwide. Last week, the White House said the idea wasn't being considered. [Congressional Democrats first proposed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u3SAUBODV2B1X_JrngiLN7V7alBaGgzkRBgvwdbz7yNlC6k8azcyv7-XbYsK8_bQ7mB7KkuFqCXqHupzZOgdHt2uCA6yDEgLUaPPCKZ8IVYSxxVtM9yJHbwIABzGCYVp_yVnM4muMRirvJ64mTZnWMxVB0pkzrtdVOTcFPaJ50qhijFGqhH4F79gMq3Zh5UrNYpAUPPZSX78L5h4hpLt8oL5c2cdkYu9HG8SPgb8H_r6u65VX96x4fODvoyTs6NqDETuQWM4GA39DhrrdpIGr0G29Sa_nfpB2tgOyx7yRAB6qTWSzjXT7h2C1mbhYsZGr4hY7qS5bIaWkeqzGHxemhG3Sg6TbbjH9q9j_69eP4X8DAAD__42PjuU) suspending the 18.4-cent tax in March. Even a full pause would shave only 10 to 16 cents per gallon, [according to the Bipartisan Policy Center](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM3qnDAUxZ8m7iL50FEXWcyf4m4KpYsuJZPcO6bEXEni2Hn7Yl-hu_MBh8Pv12N52BBDen23G5iKtCQ4S4RaIS9Hss7BXu0zwg7WASFCXm1alFA3Lnou5eJtiJ-la7xBAAW6ASOHYewmPemxWc1NOC0QUUovncRJOC-87REnGJUcoAnmWhO9lFKIXg8teicneA4On6rvJ806AT5Uyu1vCqmugPFDb8ito62JZq11L0zfmZqZms_zbLeSro6pGRI_ClPzRgk-l3eUaLtUzce2c0IMLtjIaYdUuCfKvBJ_2cKr_cPLUa48UGJqtpnf70r9-BoV0zO54Jn-9nWhg7P8hLw32fj9DDGGchtYJ16bDfHfyfpfZN9G_Q0AAP__yMyOjA). The war pushed prices up over $1.50. The administration has already [tapped the Strategic Petroleum Reserve](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3SAURL8Gd1hwsR92QZEGKcVuk41eaWFzsYkwIMDr7N9Hb38h9Ugzc87zbXkzPvi4v5sTVXNpiXjXgK1hWa5otg1zM2vAjGbD5ByWw8QFGDwoGynnizU-fC1DZ5VDBBQdKi7lNMxiFlN3KD6vghvzgElYdMOI0k4DAgiBksEqO69ebWzknDM2Ctk7u_EZV7m5FcZxFmRgaH1Lpf-TfGwHuvCVPrH0Wzq7oI7WciXiBwFNQN_33V_ZvzIC-iPl5R3vSkD__kVAv5YIaDYS0JwR0M_i96PRj3KdmaaMkdarZozWx53uptJm_tKfxUT6NIXm4jek9So7EtATm75JxTywiYDuirL59iH4-pBkYPtpfPg-2f7L7KeCfwEAAP__Zm6Jgw) and eased summer fuel-blend rules.

clean_body: President Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal Sunday, calling it "" after Tehran sent its answer through Pakistani mediators. | | | | | | Monday, May 11, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1997, IBM's Deep Blue defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov, becoming the first computer to beat a in a match under tournament conditions. Kasparov resigned after 19 moves in the sixth and final game. BIG ANNOUNCEMENT: You read this morning's Flyover. You start your day informed. But here's the thing: by the afternoon, a lot has happened since 6 a.m. We built The Flyover because we believe you deserve news you can trust, delivered in a way that respects your time. And we've heard from many of you who love starting your morning with us, but wish you didn't have to wait until tomorrow to catch up on what breaks during the day. So we listened. Introducing Flyover Updates , our brand new afternoon text message launching in just a couple of weeks. Once a day, in the afternoon, we'll send you the top three breaking news stories that happened since this morning's edition. Stories you haven't seen yet. News you don't want to miss. Delivered in a quick, easy-to-read text without any apps, algorithms, or wasted time. The world doesn't stop after our morning edition, and neither do we. Sign up now and be among the first to get Flyover Updates the moment we go live: Stay informed. Stay ahead. We'll see you in the afternoon. Today's sponsor, , explains the "joint drought" Harvard research suggests can dry out your joints from the inside--and how a simple 5-second daily method may help you move more comfortably again. | Trump Rejects Iran Peace Response President Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal Sunday, calling it "" after Tehran sent its answer through Pakistani mediators. The White House didn't release full details, but reports said and missile programs, instead pushing to end the fighting and gradually reopen the Strait of Hormuz. U.S. officials have said any deal must restore the through the strait and prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons, while Trump warned Tehran against "playing games." Patient Zero Identified in Hantavirus Outbreak Dutch ornithologist Leo Schilperoord, identified in reports as the aboard the hantavirus-stricken MV Hondius , had reportedly visited a landfill in Argentina popular with bird-watchers seeking rare species, where he may have been exposed to the virus. Seventeen Americans from the cruise ship are being flown from Tenerife, in Spain's Canary Islands, to Omaha, Nebraska, for monitoring at the University of Nebraska Medical Center. . Spanish passengers were the first to leave on Sunday on a government flight to Madrid, while other countries are arranging strict biosecurity measures. British medics and paratroopers were dropped onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British territory in the South Atlantic with no airstrip, after a from the ship there later developed suspected hantavirus symptoms. Admin Open to Gas Tax Suspension Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Sunday the Trump administration is "," including suspending the federal gas tax, as pump prices hit $4.52 a gallon nationwide. Last week, the White House said the idea wasn't being considered. suspending the 18.4-cent tax in March. Even a full pause would shave only 10 to 16 cents per gallon, . The war pushed prices up over $1.50. The administration has already and eased summer fuel-blend rules.
